cameras.title: Cameras
cameras.subtitle: Manage your video sources.
cameras.no_cameras_found_add_one: No cameras found. Add one to get started.
cameras.enter_a_range_and_scan_to: Enter a range and scan to find cameras
cameras.enter_onvif_credentials_f: Enter ONVIF credentials for this device to retrieve stream profiles.
cameras.warning_this_will_replace: Warning: This will replace configuration for selected cameras.
cameras.unique_settings_urls_onvi: * Unique settings (URLs, ONVIF credentials, Storage Profiles) are never cloned.
cameras.resolution_will_be_detect: Resolution will be detected automatically when you save.
cameras.secure_connection_rstsps: Secure Connection (RSTSPS/RTSPS) detected. Hardware acceleration and certificate skip are enabled automatically.
cameras.webcodecs_is_typically_bl: WebCodecs is typically blocked by browsers on HTTP. Access via HTTPS or localhost to enable it.
cameras.set_to_0_for_unlimited_st: Set to 0 for unlimited storage. When exceeded, oldest files are deleted.
cameras.enable_real_time_pan_tilt: Enable real-time Pan, Tilt, and Zoom controls directly from the dashboard.
cameras.configure_which_objects_p: Configure which objects (Person, Vehicle, Dog, etc.) trigger the motion in the
cameras.standard_motion_filters_t: Standard motion filters (threshold/sensitivity) are ignored in this mode.
cameras.this_camera_limited: This camera is currently limited to
cameras.more_restrictive_value: (The more restrictive value between its limit and the Global Quota is applied)
cameras.no_text_overlays: No Text Overlays, potential start delay, MP4 container only.
cameras.configuring_camera: Configuring {{name}}', { name: newCamera.name }) : t('cameras.connect_configure', 'Connect and configure your RTSP camera
cameras.connect_configure: Connect and configure your RTSP camera
cameras.obscure_sensitive_areas_o: Obscure sensitive areas of the camera feed
cameras.draw_areas_that_should_be: Draw areas that should be IGNORED by the motion detection engine.
cameras.note_enabling_privacy_mas: Note: Enabling privacy masks will automatically disable Passthrough Recording to ensure the mask is permanently burned into the video.
cameras.automatically_detect_camera: Automatically detect camera resolution on save. Disable to set manually.
cameras.enable_live_audio_listenin: Enable live audio listening via WebSockets.
cameras.audio_capability_not_detec: Audio capability not detected for this camera via ONVIF.
cameras.enables_the_take_snapshot: Enables the 'Take Snapshot' button in Live View.
cameras.tcp_is_recommended_for_: TCP is recommended for most cameras. Use UDP only if you experience lag or if your camera prefers it.
cameras.where_to_save_recording: Where to save recordings and snapshots
cameras.select_a_custom_storage: Select a custom storage location for this camera's media.
cameras.choose_the_streaming_te: Choose the streaming technology for real-time monitoring. Auto uses WebCodecs with MJPEG fallback.
cameras.leave_empty_to_use_glob: Leave empty to use Global Settings
cameras.define_areas_to_ignore_fo: Define areas to ignore for motion detection
cameras.exclusion_zones_are_invis: Exclusion zones are invisible in recordings and live view.\nThey only prevent false motion triggers in the specified areas.
cameras.enable_it_in_settings_ai_: Enable it in Settings > AI Detection Engine to use these features.
cameras.run_deep_learning_models_: Run deep learning models on motion events to identify objects.
cameras.track_objects_across_fram: Track objects across frames to reduce false positives.
cameras.saves_the_audio_stream_al: Saves the audio stream along with the video. Available in both Passthrough and Transcoding modes.
cameras.privacy_masks_active_reencode: Privacy Masks Active: The NVR must re-encode the video to permanently burn the masks into recordings. Passthrough is disabled.
cameras.directly_saves_the_video_: Directly saves the video stream without re-encoding.
cameras.recording_segments_will_b: Recording segments will be split at this length
cameras.auto_delete_old_files_whe: Auto-delete old files when limit is reached
cameras.configure_management_co: Configure management connection for PTZ and advanced features
cameras.ip_address_used_for_onv: IP address used for ONVIF management (often same as camera IP)
cameras.higher_detection_accuracy: Higher detection accuracy by utilizing the camera's native sensor-level analytics.
cameras.sensitivity_threshold_a: Sensitivity, threshold, and motion zones are handled by the camera hardware.
cameras.local_server_side_filte: Local server-side filters and Motion zones are ignored in this mode.
cameras.when_should_motion_dete: When should motion detection be active?
cameras.copied_monday_settings: Copied Monday settings to all days
cameras.timeout_helper: Wait time per port. Increase for slow WiFi.
cameras.onvif_port_help: The port used for ONVIF communication (often 80, 8080, 8000, 8899)
cameras.ptz.home_saved: New Home position saved to camera memory
cameras.ptz.save_home_network_error: Network error while saving Home position
cameras.ptz.hint_move: Press and hold to move • Release to stop
cameras.ptz.hint_home: Home positions are stored on the camera hardware
cameras.ptz.set_home_message: Set the current camera position as the new Home position? This will overwrite the previous home coordinates.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Browse recorded events and media.
timeline.delete_event_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this event? This action cannot be undone.
timeline.no_video_support: Your browser does not support video.
timeline.create_your_administrator: Create your Administrator account to secure VibeNVR
timeline.scan_this_qr_code_with_yo: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
timeline.each_code_can_only_be_use: Each code can only be used once.
timeline.manage_your_account_setti: Manage your account settings and preferences.
timeline.drag_widgets_to_reorder_c: Drag widgets to reorder. Configure visibility in settings.
timeline.no_logs_found_or_waiting: No logs found or waiting for data...
timeline.if_a_file_exceeds_this_si: If a file exceeds this size, it will be rotated.
timeline.number_of_old_log_files_t: Number of old log files to keep (e.g. 5 = keep .1 to .5).
timeline.how_often_the_system_chec: How often the system checks for large files.
timeline.author: Author
timeline.if_enabled_the_viewer_can: If enabled, the viewer can only access selected cameras/groups.
timeline.default_behavior_for_imag: Default behavior for image attachments in notifications
timeline.higher_value_much_less_cp: Higher value = Much Less CPU usage
timeline.lower_value_e_g_480_or_72: Lower value (e.g. 480 or 720) = Much Lower Bandwidth & CPU
timeline.all_cameras_are_already_a: All cameras are already assigned to other groups.
timeline.select_a_source_camera_an: Select a source camera and the categories to apply to all cameras in
timeline.map_recordings_to_differe: Map recordings to different host volumes (e.g., SSD for motion, NAS for long-term storage).
timeline.recordings_will_use_the_d: Recordings will use the default path defined in the engine.
timeline.manage_tokens_for_externa: Manage tokens for external tools like Homepage
timeline.leave_blank_for_a_permane: Leave blank for a permanent token. Recommended for automated services.
timeline.name: Name
timeline.bulk_error: Error during bulk delete: {{error}}', { error: err.message }), 'error
timeline.the_selected_model_will_b: The selected model will be used by all cameras that have the "AI Engine" enabled. Specific camera settings can still be tuned individually.
timeline.add_an_extra_layer_of_sec: Add an extra layer of security.

settings_apitokensettings.title: API Tokens
settings_apitokensettings.subtitle: Manage access tokens for 3rd party integrations (Homepage, etc.)
settings_apitokensettings.token_generated_warning: Please copy this token now. You won\'t be able to see it again!
settings_apitokensettings.revoke_message: Are you sure you want to delete this token? Any application using it will lose access immediately.

settings_liveviewlayoutsettings.title: Live View Layout
settings_liveviewlayoutsettings.subtitle: Customize how cameras are displayed
settings_liveviewlayoutsettings.grid_columns_help: Choose how many columns to display in the Live View grid

settings_generalsettings.title: General Preferences
settings_generalsettings.subtitle: Configure default application settings and landing page.

settings_notificationsettings.title: Notification Settings
settings_notificationsettings.subtitle: Configure global Email and Telegram credentials
settings_notificationsettings.note_desc: These global credentials will be used for all cameras unless a camera specifically overrides them in its own settings.
settings_notificationsettings.email_fallback_help: Fallback if camera recipient is not set
settings_notificationsettings.global_default_help: Global Default. Can be overridden per camera.
settings_notificationsettings.telegram_chat_help: Default destination for all cameras. Specific cameras can override this.
settings_notificationsettings.webhook_help: Global Default. Used if a camera doesn\'t specify a webhook.

settings_mqttsettings.title: MQTT Service
settings_mqttsettings.subtitle: Integration with Home Assistant via MQTT Discovery
settings_mqttsettings.ha_discovery_desc: When enabled, VibeNVR will automatically publish discovery messages. Your cameras will appear as new devices in Home Assistant with motion and status sensors.
settings_mqttsettings.broker_host_help: IP address or hostname of your MQTT broker

settings_aisettings.title: AI Detection Engine
settings_aisettings.subtitle: Configure the global AI model architecture and performance.

settings_advancedsettings.title: Advanced Optimization
settings_advancedsettings.subtitle: Fine-tune performance parameters for CPU and Bandwidth control.
settings_advancedsettings.warning_desc: Changing these values can significantly impact system stability and resource usage. Only modify these if you are experiencing performance issues or running on low-end hardware. Incorrect settings may cause video lag, broken streams, or high CPU usage.
settings_advancedsettings.live_fps_desc1: Adds a background-level throttle to the live stream. Setting this to
settings_advancedsettings.live_fps_desc2: means only every 2nd frame is processed (effective 15fps for 30fps source).
settings_advancedsettings.motion_fps_desc1: Controls how often the motion detection algorithm runs. Setting this to
settings_advancedsettings.motion_fps_desc2: means motion is only checked every 3rd frame.
settings_advancedsettings.pre_cap_desc1: Reduces the RAM usage of the pre-trigger buffer by storing fewer frames. Setting this to
settings_advancedsettings.pre_cap_desc2: means only every 2nd frame is buffered (saving 50% RAM), but early seconds of recording will be less fluid.
settings_advancedsettings.lv_res_desc: If a camera's resolution is higher than this (e.g. 1080p), it will be downscaled for the Live View stream in the browser. Recording quality is NOT affected.
settings_advancedsettings.mot_res_desc2: for detecting motion. Does not affect recording or live view. The engine resizes the frame to this height before comparing pixels.
settings_advancedsettings.mot_res_desc3: 180px is usually enough for human detection.
settings_advancedsettings.lv_q_desc1: Compression level for the specific Live View stream.
settings_advancedsettings.snap_q_desc1: Quality of the static JPEG images saved during motion events.
settings_advancedsettings.ffmpeg_desc1: Determines how much CPU FFMPEG uses to compress video when transcoding is required (not using Passthrough).
settings_advancedsettings.ffmpeg_desc2: but larger file sizes or lower quality.
settings_advancedsettings.verb_logs_desc1: Enables detailed logs from OpenCV and FFmpeg.
settings_advancedsettings.verb_logs_desc2: but will clutter the engine logs during normal operation.

settings_backupsettings.title: Backup & Restore
settings_backupsettings.subtitle: Export or Import system configuration (Settings, Cameras, Groups)

logs.title: System Logs
logs.subtitle: View and analyze system activity.
logs.access_denied_desc: Only administrators can view system logs.
logs.download_msg: You are about to download a system report and logs archive. This includes VibeNVR system information, resource usage, configuration summaries, and sanitized application logs. Sensitive data (tokens, passwords, IPs) is redacted.
logs.sanitized_disclaimer: Logs show sanitized output. Real-time entries may be delayed by a few seconds.

about.subtitle: The Modern, Performant, and Elegant Network Video Recorder
about.paragraph1: I built VibeNVR because existing open-source solutions felt outdated, clunky, and hard to integrate with modern home automation stacks.
about.paragraph2: VibeNVR bridges the gap between powerful features and beautiful design. It's built with a modern stack (React, Python FastAPI, OpenCV) to be lightweight, fast, and a joy to use every day.
about.support_text: If you love VibeNVR, consider giving it a Star on GitHub or buying me a coffee! Your support keeps the updates coming.

settings_storage.title: Storage Management
settings_storage.subtitle: Configure global quotas, cleanup policies, and custom storage profiles.

settings_forms.default_landing_help: Which page to show first when opening the application
settings_forms.default_streaming_help: Default streaming technology for new cameras
settings_forms.ai_activation_help: When disabled, the AI engine is completely turned off to save system resources. Individual camera AI settings will be ignored.
settings_forms.ai_arch_desc: Choose the AI model architecture used for object detection. YOLOv8 provides higher precision but requires more processing power.
settings_forms.ai_model_help: Switching models will affect all cameras with AI enabled.
settings_forms.ai_hw_help: Recommended: Google Coral TPU for YOLOv8.
settings_forms.ai_disabled_msg: AI is currently disabled globally. Enable it above to start using AI features.
settings_forms.ai_enabled_msg: The selected model will be used by all cameras that have the AI Engine enabled. Specific camera settings can still be tuned individually.
settings_forms.storage_no_limit: Total disk usage. No global limit set.
settings_forms.storage_note_desc: Camera-specific quotas are secondary to this global limit. If the global limit is reached, the oldest files across ALL cameras will be cleaned up regardless of individual camera settings.
settings_forms.storage_quota_help: Total space allowed for recordings. The system will start deleting old recordings when this limit is reached.
settings_forms.storage_interval_desc: How often to check and clean up old recordings
settings_forms.storage_enable_desc: When enabled, the system will automatically delete old recordings to respect quotas.
settings_forms.clean_now_desc: This will force an immediate check and deletion of recordings that exceed your storage limits or retention periods.
settings_forms.telemetry_desc: Helping the development team improve VibeNVR by sharing anonymous usage statistics. No sensitive data is ever collected.
settings_forms.manual_trigger: Manually trigger a report for testing or view global anonymous statistics.
settings_forms.no_ip: No IP addresses, camera names, stream URLs, usernames, or passwords are ever collected.
settings_forms.cf_anon: Fully anonymous — IP is processed by Cloudflare edge and discarded, only the country code is stored.
settings_forms.recover_desc: Scans for video files on disk that aren\'t in the database and imports them into the timeline.
